text:
Author: rm
Date: Mon Aug 13 19:07:12 2012
New Revision: 302477
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302477

Log:
  - update to version 2.3
  - update dependency upon www/py-django-sekizai (at least 0.6.1 is needed)
  - fix directories at pkg-message
  - use @dirrm (not @dirrmtry) for the port's own directories
  - don't try to use @dirrmtry to other ports directories
  
  while here:
  - use CHEESESHOP shortcut
  - remove unnecessary MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR
  - strict python version to 2.x only
  
  PR:		169599
  Submitted by:	bsam
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (6 weeks)

Modified:
  head/www/py-django-cms/Makefile
  head/www/py-django-cms/distinfo
  head/www/py-django-cms/pkg-message
  head/www/py-django-cms/pkg-plist

-USE_PYTHON=	yes
